race.comment: Looks a very sharp bit of placement by the Maher yard with TEN COMMANDMENTS (10) who has been dominant in two runs back this time in, getting himself out of trouble and bolting in fast time up to this trip last start. He just gets in so well at the weights with 50kg for Johnstone and naturally looks the one to beat again. COEUR VOLANTE (3) is absolutely flying this time in, winning her past two over this trip. She beat BIG SWINGER (6) over this route last time, the latter looking a touch unlucky but ultimately COEUR VOLANTE did it pretty easily late. She gets a lovely run again and both have claims. RISE AT DAWN (2) resumes. His best is very good and he goes well fresh. He can lead if the intent is there and will take catching. ROADCONE (9) is racing well and is an each-way hope.
